strains.name: Pineapples in Space #4
strains.notes: Pineapple Tart x Space Runtz. #4 pheno selected by Smashby's Trees in Trinidad, CO. Dense candied pineapple trichomes, easy to root. Verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens.

strains.name: Rainbow Runtz
strains.notes: Zkittlez x White Runtz. Producer: Runtz Crew x Laughing Gas collab. Cup-winning candy variety. Dense purple buds. Verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens.

strains.name: Jam Pack #2
strains.notes: PTG original breed. ~7% to rosin — hasher's dream selection from their pheno hunt.

strains.name: Kryptochronic
strains.notes: (Fruity Pebbles OG x Alien Cookies) x Jet Fuel Gelato. Bred by Compound Genetics, cultivated and distributed by Alien Labs.

strains.name: Cherry Jealousy
strains.notes: PTG original breed. Cherry cross on Jealousy (Sherbet Bx1 x Gelato 41 by Seed Junky). Deep cherry-gas profile.

strains.name: Lipsmackerz
strains.notes: (LCG x Z Animal) x Good Greens Candy. CLTVTD x Good Greens collab. Purple-expressing, Sweet flavor. Good Smoke (not listed as hasher by PTG). Verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens.

strains.name: Limecicle
strains.notes: Zkittlez x Strawberry Zkillato. Zesty lime-citrus terpene profile. Verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens.

strains.name: Papayamosa
strains.notes: LCG x Blueberry Mimosa. 6%+ to rosin. Tropical citrus-papaya terpene profile. Verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens.

strains.name: Nana Glue
strains.notes: Gorilla Glue #4 x Banana Butter Cups. Monroe's Bedhead cut — verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens. Indica-dominant. Heavy resin, banana-diesel terpenes.

strains.name: Cream Smoothie
strains.notes: Gelonade x C.R.E.A.M. Dessert hybrid with citrus-cream terpene axis. ~8-9 week finish. Verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens.

strains.name: Grease Monkey
strains.notes: Cookies & Cream x Gorilla Glue #4. Dense resinous indica-dominant with diesel-cookie profile.

strains.name: Blue Nerdz
strains.notes: Blue Sherb [Blue Cookies x Sunset Sherb] x Zkittlez. Verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens.

strains.name: Jet Fuel OG
strains.notes: Aspen OG x High Country Diesel (SFV OG x Sour Cream lineage meets NYC Diesel). Sativa-dominant (70/30), high-octane diesel fuel terps.

strains.name: Blue Dream
strains.notes: DJ Short's Blueberry x Santa Cruz Haze. Classic SoCal heirloom, made famous around 2003. Verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens.

strains.name: Pre 98 Bubba Kush
strains.notes: Classic SoCal indica heirloom, pre-1998 phenotype. Exact lineage unknown. Hash plant structure, heavy sedating indica. Verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens.

strains.name: Skywalker OG
strains.notes: TRUE OG Kush clone (Emerald Triangle x Nevil's Hindu Kush). Renamed 'Skywalker OG' at the Sunset Collective in West Hollywood. PTG received it from a mentor who held it 15+ years. Verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens.

strains.name: Kush Mintz
strains.notes: Bubba Kush x Animal Mints. Rabid Hippie cut — SoCal classic. Verified cut from Pig Tail Gardens.
